Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Janet Wong, Esq., for the Plaintiff People of the State of California, actiong by and through the Department of Transportation.
Witness Teresa McNamara sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Mike Garza, individually, and Mike Garza dba A.C. AUTO WRECKERS.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendan as follows:

Damages $131,615.00
Pre-judgment interest $11,666.47
for a total Judgment of $143,281.47
Attorney's Fees and costs to be submitted by way of memorandum of costs sanction order $350.00 awarded by the Court August 25, 2011 which is upaid to be included in memorandum of costs.

Order after Trial signed. Counsel for file memorandum of costs and submit proposed judgment for the court's signature.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Discovery Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMEY WYMAN, TEL. NO. 904-5700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MIKE GARZA, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS HEARD TWICE DUE TO THE FAILURE OF THE DEFENDANT TO COME ON TIME. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 9:35 A.M., THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S Motion For Discovery Sanctions - Having failed to provide ordered Discovery, Defendant is barred from presenting any evidence at trial and is limited to cross examining Plaintiff's witnesses. Defendant is also ordered to pay Plaintiff sanctions in the amount of $350.00. The court is sympathetic to Defendants health issue but they do not excuse ignoring his discovery obligations and disobeying court orders. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
